# Calibrate reconciles drift for a target entity.

# Setup
exec orbiter galaxy add acme-corp
exec orbiter planet add payments-api --galaxy acme-corp

# No resources → nothing to calibrate
exec orbiter calibrate payments-api
stdout 'nothing to calibrate'

# With an unregistered resource, calibrate reports action taken
exec orbiter resource add git-tool --role tool --brand git
exec orbiter attach git-tool payments-api

# Calibrate attempts to reconcile; without the integration loaded the resource
# stays in failed state but the command exits cleanly.
exec orbiter calibrate payments-api
stdout 'tool/git'
